title: RGUHS Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: RGUHS Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Rajiv Gandhi University of Health Sciences Result 2026 declared for MBBS, BHMS, BSc Nursing, BPharm and other UG, PG and paramedical courses on the official website - rguhs.ac.in via the RGUHS result portal gnanasangama.karnataka.gov.in/rguresult. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the RGUHS result.

content.text: Rajiv Gandhi University of Health Sciences has released RGUHS Result 2026 for various MBBS, BHMS, BSc Nursing, BPharm and other health science courses, covering multiple semesters and exam sessions under its affiliated colleges. RGUHS Result 2026 has been released online on the official result portal gnanasangama.karnataka.gov.in/rguresult which is accessible from the main university website rguhs.ac.in.

Students from different UG and PG programmes in medicine, dentistry, nursing, pharmacy, Ayurveda, homeopathy, physiotherapy and allied health sciences can log in using their registration/roll number and course details to check and download their latest semester or year wise marksheets. After viewing the online result, candidates should verify personal details, subject wise marks, internal and external scores, totals and pass/fail status, and contact their college or university examination branch in case of any discrepancy.

The RGUHS Results 2026 portal consolidates examination outcomes for a wide spectrum of health science courses, making it easier for students and institutions to track academic progress. It supports results for regular, supplementary and revaluation exams held across different months and is updated frequently as new results are processed.
RGUHS publishes all its course wise results exclusively through the Gnana Sangama result portal, where students can search by registration number after selecting the appropriate course and exam.

links.label: RGUHS MBBS, BHMS, BSc Nursing, BPharm and Other Course Results 2026

content.text: Follow these steps to check and download your RGUHS Result 2026 for MBBS, BHMS, BSc Nursing, BPharm or any other course:

items: On the homepage, select the result type/exam category, such as MBBS, BSc Nursing, BPharm, BHMS or other relevant programme.
Choose the exam session/semester or year from the dropdown, if prompted.
Enter your Registration Number / Roll Number / Student ID exactly as printed on your hall ticket.
Click on the View Result / Submit button to display your marksheet.
Check your name, college, course, semester/year, subject wise marks (theory/practical), internal and external marks, totals and result status.
Download or print the online result for your records, counselling, internship, licensing or higher education applications.

structured_links.label: RGUHS MBBS, BHMS, BSc Nursing, BPharm and Other Course Results 2026
